title: Spicy Creamy Peruvian Cauliflower Bake
description: A comforting, turmeric-infused cauliflower bake with a bold Peruvian spice blend, creamy coconut sauce, and a touch of heat-perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 4–5 minutes.
Add minced garlic, aji amarillo paste, and turmeric powder; cook 1–2 minutes until fragrant.
Toss cauliflower florets into the skillet, coating them with the spice mixture; cook 5 minutes until slightly tender.
Transfer cauliflower to the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
In a saucepan, combine coconut milk, nutritional yeast, chickpeas, salt, and 1/2 cup of water. Simmer, whisking until the sauce thickens, about 5 minutes.
Pour the sauce over the cauliflower in the baking dish and sprinkle chopped cilantro on top.
Bake for 20–25 minutes until the cauliflower is golden and the sauce is bubbly.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving. Garnish with extra cilantro if desired.
